title: Dashboard Omnicanal de Ventas + Capa de IA
summary: Architecture and implementation plan for a multi-channel sales dashboard consolidating WordPress, Mercado Libre, Dropi, POS, WhatsApp, and Falabella with an autonomous + conversational AI layer.
scope: channel connectors (WordPress, Mercado Libre Colombia, Dropi, POS, WhatsApp, Falabella)
Supabase Postgres 5-layer schema (raw, master, facts, marts, insights)
product master catalog and matching pipeline
LLMProvider adapter (Kimi K2, Claude Haiku, GPT-4o-mini, Gemini Flash)
KPIs and dashboard views (Hoy, Productos, Canales, Inteligencia, Operacion)
risk register and pre-Phase-1 open decisions
